subject: Old - English
note: Practice feed me correct answer nahi hota; jaha ID important-questions se match hua waha answer bhara hai (answer_source).

questions.question_text: The rebel disturbs a class
questions.solution: with his talk

questions.question_text: A rebel does

options.label: B
options.text: the opposite of what all others do

questions.correct_answer: the opposite of what all others do
questions.solution: the opposite of what all others do

questions.question_text: The rebel will sit quietly when
questions.solution: all others talk

questions.question_text: Most of the people attend the meeting when

options.label: A
options.text: the rebel is discussing other matters

options.label: C
options.text: the rebel is busy in file work

questions.solution: the rebel stays at home

questions.question_text: A rebel decides his action

options.label: C
options.text: when he knows what others are doing

questions.correct_answer: when he knows what others are doing
questions.solution: when he knows what others are doing

questions.question_text: Who is the poet of the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The Rebel is a poem that talks about the one that does everything contradictory to the others. It is a beautiful poem that talks about a rebel and have been written by the well-known British academic, novelist, critic, and poet Dennis Joseph Enright.

questions.question_text: How does the rebel dress when others wear fantastic clothes, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel doesn't follow what everyone else does. If the others wore fantastic clothes, he dressed soberly. Hence, he was a rebel in every way.

questions.question_text: According to the poem The Rebel, when does the rebel grow his hair long?

options.label: A
options.text: When he is told to keep long hair

questions.solution: The rebel never followed the others and always did the opposite of what everyone did. So when everyone had short hair, he grew his hair long and when everybody had long hair, he kept his hair short.

questions.question_text: What did the rebel use to do when everyone kept silent during the lessons, as discussed in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The poet mentioned in the poem that when no one spoke a word during the lessons, the rebel created a disturbance. But, when the others talked during the lessons, he would instead stay quiet.

questions.question_text: What did the rebel wear when others were in uniform, in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel never dressed in accordance with the others. If the others were in uniform, he would come wearing fantastic clothes.

questions.question_text: In whose company does the rebel express his preference for cats, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?

options.label: A
options.text: In the company of fish lovers

options.label: B
options.text: In the company of dog lovers

options.label: C
options.text: In the company of bird lovers

options.label: D
options.text: In the company of cat lovers

questions.correct_answer: In the company of dog lovers
questions.solution: The poet mentioned in the poem that the rebel would always contradict his fellows. Hence, if he were present among a company of dog lovers, he would express his preference for cats over dogs.

questions.question_text: What does the rebel remark on when everybody praises the sun, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel remarked on the need for rain when everyone else praised the sun. He could never agree with the others and the poet beautifully sketched it in the poem.

questions.question_text: When does the rebel put in good words about dogs, as we know from the poem The Rebel?

options.label: A
options.text: In the company of horse lovers

options.label: B
options.text: In the company of cat lovers

options.label: C
options.text: In the company of bird lovers

options.label: D
options.text: In the company of dog lovers

questions.correct_answer: In the company of cat lovers
questions.solution: The poet said that the rebel would put in good words about dogs when he is in the company of cat lovers. But, when he is in the company of dog lovers, he would talk about cats and prefer them over dogs.

questions.question_text: When does the rebel regret the absence of the sun, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel regretted the absence of the sun when everyone else greeted the rain. Contrarily, he would talk about the need for rain when others praised the sun.

questions.question_text: What does the rebel do at home when others attend meetings, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel would read a book when he did not attend meetings and stayed at home, unlike others.

questions.question_text: When did the rebel stay at home, as mentioned in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The rebel stayed at home and read books when the others went to attend meetings. The rebel's actions were never in accordance with the others.

questions.question_text: What does the rebel do when everybody stays at home and reads a book, as gathered from the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The poet said in the poem that the rebel stayed at home and read a book when everybody would attend meetings. However, when everybody else stayed at home and read a book, he would instead attend meetings.

questions.question_text: When everybody says 'Yes Please', what does the rebel say? (The Rebel)
questions.solution: When everyone would say 'Yes please', the rebel would politely deny any offer. The poem depicted the nature of the rebel with each of his actions.

questions.question_text: When does the rebel say 'Yes please', according to the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The poet had depicted the actions of the rebel and indicated his rebellious nature in each of his actions. So, when everyone else would say 'Yes please', he would reply with a no. But on the contrary, when everyone else would say 'No, thank you', the rebel would say 'Yes please'.

questions.question_text: What kind of a person would you not find yourself to be good according to the poet in the poem The Rebel?
questions.solution: The poet mentioned that it is good that we have rebels but you would not feel it good to be one.

questions.question_text: The rebel is likely to refuse the offer which is:
questions.solution: The rebels refuse the offer accepted by others and when others refuse to accept an offer, the rebel accepts it thankfully.

questions.question_text: A rebel is a person who does exactly:

options.label: A
options.text: the opposite of what others do

questions.correct_answer: the opposite of what others do
questions.solution: A rebel is a person who goes against set rules and laws. He does not like to follow them. He likes to do the opposite of what others love to do.

questions.question_text: The opposite of rebel is:
questions.solution: supporter

questions.question_text: A rebel is generally:
questions.solution: A rebel is generally disliked because a rebel is a person who does not do things the way everyone else is doing and does not behave like everyone else.

questions.question_text: What must be the opinion of a rebel?
questions.solution: The rebels try to bring about the change by retaining their own voice and preferences as well as opinions rather than blindly following the crowd.

questions.question_text: What does a rebel do when nobody talks during the class?
questions.solution: When nobody talks during the lesson, the rebel breaks this silence and creates a disturbance.

questions.question_text: What does the rebel do?
questions.solution: A rebel is a person who stands up to or defies authority or others.

questions.question_text: What does a rebel do when everybody wears a uniform?
questions.solution: When everyone is in a uniform, the rebel dresses in fantastic clothes.

questions.question_text: The rebel keeps silent when everybody:
questions.solution: During a lesson when everyone is talking, the rebel would keep quiet/silent and when all are quiet he would speak.

questions.question_text: When everybody talks during the lesson, the rebel:
questions.solution: During a lesson when everyone is talking then he would keep silent and when all are silent he would talk.

questions.question_text: When everybody wears fantastic clothes, the rebel:
questions.solution: When everyone is playfully and colourfully dressed, the rebel would dress up very soberly.

questions.question_text: When everybody loves cats, the rebel:
questions.solution: In the company of dog lovers, the rebel expresses a preference for cats. He praises dogs when he is surrounded by people who like cats.

questions.question_text: If someone does not wear a school uniform, what will the teacher call him?
questions.solution: The teacher will call him/her careless and disobedient, a rule-breaker, or a rebel.

questions.question_text: When everyone wants a clear sky. What does the rebel prefer?
questions.solution: On a clear day, the rebel longs most for the rain.

questions.question_text: In the company of dog lovers, what does the rebel prefer?
questions.solution: In the company of dog lovers, the rebel prefers cats. But in the company of cat lovers, he praises dogs.

questions.question_text: When everybody has short hair, what does the rebel do?
questions.solution: When everyone has short hair, the rebel keeps long hair.

questions.question_text: According to the poem, what does a rebel always do?

options.label: C
options.text: They retain their voice and preferences

questions.solution: The rebels always contradict others because they wish to be different and stand out from the rest of the crowd. They try to gain others’ attention by retaining their own voice and preferences as well as opinions rather than blindly following the crowd.

questions.question_text: When does the rebel grows long hair?

options.label: C
options.text: When no one is growing long hair

options.label: D
options.text: When he has to go to the salon

questions.solution: The rebel keeps his hair long when others cut theirs short.

questions.question_text: What does the poet say about being a rebel?

options.label: A
options.text: It is tough to be a rebel

options.label: B
options.text: It is good to have rebel

options.label: C
options.text: The society disapprove of the rebels

questions.correct_answer: It is tough to be a rebel
questions.solution: The poet says that it doesn’t feel good (or it is tough) to be a rebel because a rebel will not find it easy to be one.

questions.question_text: What word best describes does the rebel mentioned in the poem?
questions.solution: Contrary

questions.question_text: Which of these best matches the description of a rebel in the poem?

options.label: A
options.text: A man who goes to the right when the entire crowd is going left.

options.label: B
options.text: A tall man who lives among short people.

options.label: C
options.text: A man who does not spend money in the company of friends.

options.label: D
options.text: A man who fights against the government.

questions.correct_answer: A man who goes to the right when the entire crowd is going left.
questions.solution: A man who goes to the right when the entire crowd is going left.

questions.question_text: In a class, the students were studying for a test. Based on the poem, which image shows the rebel?

The rebel dresses soberly.
What does the word 'soberly' mean in the line above?
questions.solution: Simply

questions.question_text: What does the poet mainly do till the last two lines of the poem? (The Rebel)

options.label: B
options.text: Suggests why people don't like rebels

options.label: D
options.text: Teaches how to behave in society

questions.solution: Describes how a rebel behaves

questions.question_text: What is the tone of the last two lines of the poem? (The Rebel)
questions.solution: Cautionary

questions.question_text: What word best describes the language of the poem? (The Rebel)
questions.solution: Plain
